title: Admissions Open for Session 2025–26
description: Applications are invited for Diploma courses for the academic year 2025–26. Interested candidates must apply before the last date as per official guidelines.

title: Diploma Examination Schedule Released
description: The examination schedule for all diploma courses has been officially released. Students are advised to check the dates carefully and prepare accordingly.

title: Internship Drive for Final Year Students
description: An internship drive is being organized for final year students in collaboration with industry partners. Eligible students are encouraged to register.
